title: HushSpec Decision Receipt v0
description: A self-contained record of a single HushSpec policy evaluation decision. Receipts capture the full context of an evaluation: the action that was evaluated, the decision that was reached, the rule trace showing every rule block consulted, and the policy identity.

receipt_id.description: Unique identifier for this receipt (UUID v4).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the evaluation occurred, with UTC timezone (Z suffix).

hushspec_version.description: The HushSpec specification version used for evaluation.

decision.description: The final evaluation decision: allow, warn, or deny.

matched_rule.description: The rule path that determined the final decision (e.g., 'rules.tool_access.block'). Null when no specific rule matched.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why the decision was reached.

rule_trace.description: Ordered trace of every rule block consulted during evaluation. Includes rules that were skipped due to short-circuiting.

origin_profile.description: The ID of the origin profile that was selected during evaluation, if any.

posture.description: Posture state information, including current state and next state after any signal-triggered transition.

evaluation_duration_us.description: Wall-clock evaluation time in microseconds. Excludes receipt construction and serialization time.

ActionSummary.description: Summary of the evaluated action. Content is never included directly; only a hash is recorded to prevent accidental logging of sensitive data.

type.description: The action type that was evaluated (e.g., 'tool_call', 'egress', 'file_read').

target.description: The target of the action (tool name, URL, file path, etc.). Null when not applicable.

content_redacted.description: True when action content was present but omitted from the receipt for privacy.

RuleEvaluation.description: Record of a single rule block evaluation during the decision process.

rule_block.description: The rule block that was consulted (e.g., 'rules.forbidden_paths', 'rules.tool_access.block').

outcome.description: The outcome of this rule evaluation. 'skip' indicates the rule was not evaluated (disabled, not applicable, or short-circuited).

matched_rule.description: The specific rule path that produced this outcome, if any.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why this rule produced this outcome.

evaluated.description: Whether the rule block was actually evaluated. False if the rule was short-circuited by a prior decision or is not applicable to the action type.

PolicySummary.description: Identity and integrity summary of the policy document used during evaluation.

name.description: The name field from the policy document, if present.

version.description: The hushspec version field from the policy document.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the canonical JSON serialization of the resolved policy document.

PostureResult.description: Posture state at evaluation time and after any signal-triggered transition.

current.description: The posture state that was active during evaluation.

next.description: The posture state after any signal-triggered transition. Same as current if no transition occurred.
